## Checklist

- [ ] **`CI / ci-gate`** is required and passes (or explain why not).
- [ ] **Secrets / env:** if this touches Auth0, Docker, or k8s, update **`docs/GITHUB-ENVIRONMENT.md`** or **`docs/DEVOPS-RUNBOOK.md`** when operators need new steps.
- [ ] **Migrations / cluster:** if data or manifests need manual action, note it in the PR description.
